name: Pineapple Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and mix it with the crushed biscuits and sugar. Press the mixture into a Swiss roll tin and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Beat together the butter icing ingredients until smooth, then spread evenly over the cooled biscuit base.
3. Drain the pineapple thoroughly and spread it on top of the icing. Cover the pineapple with whipped cream.
4. Cut into squares.
